article_meta.title: Trump strategy document revives Monroe Doctrine, slams EuropeBy Idrees Ali, Matt Spetalnick and James MackenzieDecember

reasoning: Some genuine author-prose bias was correctly flagged (e.g., subjective adjectives), but there is an attribution rule violation (flagging quoted language as author bias) and multiple significant misses in the author’s prose. One label is debatable.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged 'civilizational erasure,' which the article attributes to the document and quotes directly — an attribution violation.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: One clear false positive due to quoted text; other flagged items are defensible, though one is borderline (vague sourcing).
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed several major author-level biases: headline 'slams Europe,' 'dour view,' 'reassert its dominance,' and especially 'increasingly racist rhetoric' stated in author voice without sourcing.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels for the two valid subjective adjective flags are appropriate; 'Omission of Source Attribution' for vague 'some European commentators' is debatable but defensible.
